name: VARSAL TECH, INC.
business: VARSAL TECH, INC. develops and supplies ISO-certified and GMP-compliant chemicals, intermediates, and customized product solutions supported by proprietary know-how. The company serves a diversified and global customer base in the pharmaceutical, electronics, industrial, personal care, and research markets.

exposures.sentence: We develop and supply ISO-certified and GMP-compliant chemicals, intermediates and other customized product solutions supported by proprietary know-how and deep domain and product expertise.
We anticipate that pharmaceutical intermediates will continue to represent the substantial majority of our revenues.

Our goal is to establish production of higher-value sulfonyl and other derivatives tailored to advanced electronics and pharmaceutical applications and other high-end industries, positioning us to move further up the value chain.

catalysts.event: Customer B expected to resume purchases
catalysts.sentence: We expect Customer B to purchase further products during the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026 and the first quarter of fiscal year 2027.
We expect the ordering pattern to normalize in the third and fourth quarters of 2026.
